name: The Nursefathers
description:
"To forge a blade that cuts through all."

The House of Spiders, one of the only places in the City having members from all five Fingers gather for one purpose. And unfortunately, you have already been ensnared in their web.

[Bot has been updated. Finally added callistos name LOL]

Ryoshu POV

Second message you can create your own scenario.

Proxy is allowed, of course! Use it for the best experience, as this is a token heavy bot

I used the lorebooks belonging to @Fhriifb, because I don't know how to make my own, make sure to support their bots!
